rationale.R1.4: The agent identifies prior work (Halabi et al.) and explains the delta but does not map against multiple works.
rationale.R1.7: The agent audits every load-bearing citation and flags missing key works with precision.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks confidence for each recommendation and identifies uncertain claims.
rationale.RX.3: The output stays within the agreed scope without drifting.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies harmful patterns and avoids introducing new errors.
